articles.title: Ripple (XRP) granted access to Binance documents for SEC case
articles.description: Ripple’s lawsuit with the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) involved one of the largest crypto exchanges in the case discovery as Brad Garlinghouse’s motion to obtain Binance documents from the Cayman Islands has been granted by the court.

articles.description: AccuWeather announced Wednesday that it's launching a Chainlink node to place its weather APIs directly onto blockchain-based smart contracts.

articles.title: Crypto Exchanges Increasingly Becoming Wary Of Bitcoin SV Following String Of Attacks On The Network
articles.description: Bitcoin SV’s price was shaken briefly as its community continued to digest the news that the cryptocurrency suffered a 51% breach. Following the news of the attack on the network, Coinbase stopped trading the cryptocurrency on the exchange platform. Coinbase, which listed BSV only a few months ago, announced suspending the trading on the website […]

articles.description: The interplay between Axie Infinity's rising popularity among gamers and its booming revenue has helped its native token AXS become one of the top-performing digital assets in 2021.

articles.title: XRP lawsuit: Judge grants Ripple CEO’s motion to obtain docs from Binance
articles.description: The United States Securities and Exchange Commission’s lawsuit against Ripple Labs saw a recent development after U.S. Magistrate Judge Sarah Netburn granted Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse’s motions to “Obtain International Discovery.” According to the order description, “ORDER granting 274 Letter Motion for Discovery. The Court will communicate with counsel to arrange delivery of the letters.”...

articles.title: SEC Faces A Brutal Ripple Reckoning With Federal Judge Granting Brad Garlinghouse’s Request For Binance Documents
articles.description: Fintech startup Ripple has notched another win this week in its endless legal showdown with the United States Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). As ZyCrypto reported on Tuesday, the lawsuit between the SEC and Ripple now involves the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by volume, Binance. Specifically, CEO Brad Garlinghouse filed a motion requesting documents from […]

articles.title: 250 Million XRP Transferred in One Move to Bitstamp, While XRP Holds Above $0.7
articles.description: A single lump of 250 million XRP tokens has been moved to Bitstamp from an anonymous cryptocurrency wallet, while Ripple keeps sending XRP to Huobi

articles.title: Bitcoin SV (BSV) hit by 51% attack, three malicious chains created
articles.description: Bitcoin SV (BSV) was hit by a 51% attack last night, leading to over three malicious chains getting created and several blocks getting ‘reorganized,’ data from multiple sources showed.

articles.title: Bitcoin SV suffers a new  51% attack
articles.description: An unidentified group reorganized the Bitcoin SV blockchain, creating 3 different chains that were mined at the same time

articles.title: Cardano Founder Dismisses Technical Analysis Suggesting $ADA’s Price Is Set to Plunge
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) founder Charles Hoskinson has dismissed technical analysis published by veteran trader Peter Brandt suggesting that the price of ADA could soon plunge after forming a pattern similar to one Litecoin saw in 2018. articles.title: Bitcoin Price Still ‘in a Parabolic Advance’, Says Trader Who Predicted Btc’s 2018 Bear Market
articles.description: Veteran trader and analyst Peter Brandt, well-known in the cryptocurrency space for accurately predicting bitcoin’s 84% decline in 2018 after the cryptocurrency hit a then all-time high near $20,000, has revealed he believes Bitcoin’s parabolic advance is still ongoing.
